title: Trump trades NBA boos for UFC cheers as sports become dividing line
description: Once a refuge from political division, major sports have become a partisan arena in the Trump era.

title: A Trump push to cut 'statistical noise' could mean less data from the Census Bureau
description: New public data for redistricting and other uses may be reduced as Trump officials limit the ways the Census Bureau can protect people's privacy when it releases statistics.

title: Controversy swirls around the UFC event on the White House lawn this weekend
description: President Trump is hosting a UFC fight on the White House lawn on his birthday.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: A key U.S. spy tool has lapsed — now what?
description: The government says more than 60% of the president's daily intelligence briefing relies on information collected under a tool known as FISA Section 702. But Congress has struggled to renew it.

title: Door shuts on some immigrant entrepreneurs as U.S. restricts small-business loans
description: For decades, immigrants who are legal permanent residents in the U.S. could get loans through the Small Business Administration, a core pillar of small-business lending. Not anymore.

title: Trump's DOJ can't get names and medical files of trans youth in California, for now
description: Trump's Department of Justice is seeking patient files that include the names of young people who have been treated in transgender clinics, as well as hospital staff who have provided care.

title: Trump nominates Jay Clayton to serve as director of national intelligence
description: President Trump has nominated Jay Clayton, the former chairman of the SEC, to serve as director of national intelligence. It follows a pick for acting director that caused an uproar on Capitol Hill.

title: Sen. Chris Coons talks about Trump's new nominee for national intelligence director
description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Democratic Sen. Chris Coons of Delaware about President Trump's new nominee to oversee the U.S. intelligence community.

title: White House UFC event comes as Trump faces political headwinds
description: The upcoming UFC event at the White House comes as President Trump has been politically on rocky ground.

title: Is there a strategy behind Trump's building projects around D.C.?
description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Todd Belt of George Washington University about whether there's a strategy behind President Trump's fixation on a UFC fight and building projects across Washington, D.C.

title: Ousted South Korean President Yoon given prison term for drone flights over Pyongyang
description: South Korea's ousted President Yoon Suk Yeol and his former defense minister were sentenced to 30 years in prison Friday in a case alleging Yoon ordered drone flights over Pyongyang in 2024 to heighten tensions with North Korea and justify declaring martial law at home.

title: Oil executives warn White House that gas prices will get worse
description: Grim predictions add to the problems of a president already facing a sharp rise in inflation.
